ReleaseNotes: Astigmatism axis overlay: the topography maps can now show the corneal astigmatism axes (steep in blue, flat in red) for the 3 mm, 3-5 mm and 5 mm zones. It is off by default — right-click a map and choose "Astigmatism axis" to turn it on.

Clearer keratometry readout: reports and the Target step now show the mean K (Km) together with the flat (K1) and steep (K2) values and their axes, instead of a single "Kmean" figure that could be misleading on eyes with high astigmatism.

Mode-aware thickness label: the manual thickness adjustment is now labelled to match the treatment mode — "Flap Thickness" (LASIK), "PRK Adjustment" (PRK) or "Transepi Ablation" (TransEpi) — consistently in the PREOP review, the ablation result panel and the report.
Reliability and quality improvements: internal fixes to the interactive topography display and a larger automated test suite for more dependable results.
